title_en: Agent Planning with World Knowledge Model
title_zh: 基于世界知识模型的智能体规划
abstract_en: This work introduces a world knowledge model to support agent planning by combining global prior knowledge with dynamic local task knowledge.
abstract_zh: 该工作提出世界知识模型，通过结合全局先验知识与局部动态任务知识来辅助智能体规划。
editorial_summary_zh: 是把世界模型思路明确迁移到语言智能体规划中的代表工作。
editorial_summary_en: A representative paper that ports world-model thinking into language-agent planning.
why_it_matters: It gives the site a clearer bridge from classical world models into modern agent planning systems.
